title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.411 - Distance to be maintained when overtaking a bicycle
text:
300.411.  Distance to be maintained when overtaking a bicycle. — The operator of a motor vehicle overtaking a bicycle proceeding in the same direction on the roadway, as defined in section 300.010, shall leave a safe distance when passing the bicycle, and shall maintain clearance until safely past the overtaken bicycle.
(L. 2005 H.B. 487 merged with S.B. 372)
